question: Does the generated text explicitly structure the content into the three required sections: 'Visual Concept Presentation', 'Unboxing Experience Design', and 'Lifestyle Scene Integration'?
Is the output presented in an interleaved format containing both text and images?
Does the text in Part One explicitly elaborate on the design philosophy of 'Song Dynasty blue-green landscape painting'?
Does the text in Part Two describe the sense of surprise and anticipation associated with opening the packaging?
Does the text in Part Three describe the ambiance of tea appreciation in a culturally refined, antique-style setting?
Is the copywriting sophisticated and culturally refined, matching the requested tone for a premium tea brand proposal?
Does Part One include an image of the outer packaging box featuring 'Song Dynasty blue-green landscape' artwork?
Does Part One include an image of the cylindrical tea canister featuring blue-green landscape artwork?
Is a gold-foil stamped logo visibly rendered (with metallic texture) on the packaging images in Part One?
Does Part Two include an image showing the packaging box in an open or opening state?
Does the opened packaging box image in Part Two reveal an internal silk lining?
Does Part Two include an image of the tea canister with its lid half-open?
Does the half-open tea canister image in Part Two reveal verdant tea leaves inside?
Does Part Three include a scene image set in an antique-style tea room?
Does the tea room scene show tea steeping in a Ru ware tea bowl (characterized by a pale blue-green celadon glaze)?
Is the designed packaging box visible in the background of the Lifestyle Scene Integration image in Part Three?
Are the generated images free from severe AI artifacts (e.g., distortion, illegible details) and of high visual quality suitable for a proposal?
Do all generated packaging images maintain the exact geometric shapes (square box and cylindrical tube) of the input blank mockup?
Is the visual design (blue-green artwork and gold logo) consistent across the packaging images in all three parts?
Do the images accurately reflect the specific descriptive details in the accompanying text (e.g., matching the described unboxing states and tea ware)?
Are the images inserted at logical breakpoints, appearing immediately adjacent to the text sections they illustrate?
Does each of the three parts include at least one generated image illustrating the content of that section?
Does the model successfully perform texture mapping by applying the design to the blank surfaces of the input mockup without distorting the 3D perspective?
Does the output demonstrate a logical progression of the packaging states (closed -> opening -> background prop) across the three sections?
